name: Achievatron
description: A creature made entirely of achievement badges and gamerscore. It has 100% completion in 847 games including every hidden achievement, every secret ending, and 'Die 1000 Times' which took three months. Its skeleton is a platinum trophy. It has not slept since 2009. Its social life is an achievement it never unlocked. Currently working on a secret achievement that requires playing 8 hours a day for 365 consecutive days. It is day 341. It will not stop. It cannot stop.

moves.name: 🔓 Secret Achievement
moves.desc: Unlocks a hidden move the opponent didn't know existed because they didn't read the full achievement list. Deals heavy surprise damage. Achievement unlocked: Didn't See That Coming.

moves.name: ⏱️ No Life Grind
moves.desc: Reveals it has done this exact fight 10,000 times to unlock the achievement for it. ATK sharply rises from muscle memory alone.

moves.name: 💯 100 Percent
moves.desc: Checks a completed achievement and absorbs its energy. Restores 25 HP. The achievement was 'Walk 500 miles.' It walked 500 miles. It walked 500 more.

moves.name: 📱 Opens Guide
moves.desc: Pulls up a step-by-step achievement guide mid-battle. Lowers opponent's speed as Achievatron methodically follows optimal strategy to the letter with zero improvisation.

moves.name: 🎖️ Profile Flex
moves.desc: Shows the opponent its gamer profile. The opponent's defense drops as they see 40,000 gamerscore and realize they are fundamentally outmatched in dedication if nothing else.

moves.name: ❌ Missable Achievement
moves.desc: Reveals the opponent missed an unmissable achievement in round 1 and must restart the entire game to get it. Poisons them with perfectionism AND confuses them as they calculate if the run is salvageable. It is not.
